Splash.title: OBIGBO
Splash.subtitle: Welcome Home [ig]
Splash.tagline: A place of belonging for the Igbo community worldwide [ig]
Splash.stat1: Growing community of Igbo people worldwide [ig]

About.title: About OBIGBO [ig]
About.missionText: OBIGBO is a digital home for the global Igbo community. We connect Igbo people worldwide, preserving our rich cultural heritage while building bridges across generations and geographies. [ig]
About.visionText: A world where every Igbo person, no matter where they are, feels connected to their roots and empowered by their community. [ig]
About.cultureText: The Igbo people are one of the largest ethnic groups in Africa, with a vibrant diaspora spanning every continent. OBIGBO brings us together in a space that celebrates our language, traditions, and shared values of community, enterprise, and resilience. [ig]
About.foundingText: OBIGBO was born from a simple observation: while Igbo people thrive individually across the globe, we lack a dedicated digital space to connect, share, and grow together as a community. This platform is our answer to that need. [ig]
About.ctaText: Be part of a growing network of Igbo people connecting, sharing, and preserving our culture together. [ig]
